claims.supporting_quote: It is differentially expressed, usually upregulated, in allergic conditions, a variety of inflammatory diseases... In allergic reactions periostin is involved in type 2 immunity and can be induced by IL-4 and IL-13 in bronchial cells.

coverage_notes: Manually grounded by Claude reading Stage3b abstracts directly (no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY available for automated Stage4b in this environment). Marker source: disease_clinical_biomarkers.py (real lab/clinical biomarker), not the gene-target panel.
